name: Mutual Lease Termination Agreement
description: A mutual agreement between a landlord and a tenant to officially terminate a lease and detail the return of the security deposit.
content:
MUTUAL LEASE TERMINATION AGREEMENT

This Mutual Lease Termination Agreement (the "Agreement") is entered into on {{formatDate agreement_date}} by and between the Landlord, {{landlord_name}}, and the Tenant, {{tenant_name}}, to mutually terminate the lease agreement originally dated {{formatDate original_lease_date}} for the premises located at {{property_address}}.

1. THE PARTIES

Landlord: {{landlord_name}}
Address: {{landlord_address}}

Tenant: {{tenant_name}}
Address: {{tenant_address}}

2. TERMINATION OF LEASE

The Parties mutually agree to terminate the Lease Agreement. The Lease shall be officially deemed null and void effective as of {{formatDate termination_date}}.

3. SURRENDER OF PREMISES

The Tenant agrees to fully vacate the premises, remove all personal property, and return all keys to the Landlord no later than {{formatDate move_out_date}}. The premises shall be returned in broom-clean condition, subject to normal wear and tear.

4. SECURITY DEPOSIT AND DEDUCTIONS

The original security deposit paid by the Tenant was {{security_deposit_amount}}. {{#if (eq deductions_apply 'Yes')}}The Landlord will make the following deductions totaling the amounts listed below. The remaining balance of {{remaining_deposit_amount}} will be returned to the Tenant.{{else}}The Landlord shall return the security deposit in full without any deductions.{{/if}}

{{#if (eq deductions_apply 'Yes')}}

Itemized Deductions:

{{deduction_details}}
{{/if}}

The final deposit amount will be returned to the Tenant within {{deposit_return_days}} days of the move-out date via {{return_method}}.

5. UTILITIES AND OUTSTANDING BALANCES

The Tenant remains responsible for all utility charges and any outstanding rent balances incurred up to the move-out date. The Landlord reserves the right to hold the Tenant accountable for any unpaid bills transferred to the property address during the Tenant's occupancy.

6. MUTUAL RELEASE

Upon the complete execution of this Agreement and the successful surrender of the premises, both Parties hereby fully and forever release and discharge each other from any and all claims, liabilities, or obligations arising from the original Lease Agreement, except as explicitly preserved herein.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the Parties have executed this Mutual Lease Termination Agreement as of the date first above written.

LANDLORD
{{landlord_name}}

Signature: _________________________

TENANT
{{tenant_name}}

Signature: _________________________

fields.name: deductions_apply
fields.label: Will there be deductions from the deposit?

fields.name: deduction_details
fields.label: Itemized Deductions (If Yes)
fields.placeholder: e.g., Cleaning fee: $150, Unpaid water bill: $50

fields.name: deposit_return_days
fields.label: Days to Return Deposit after Move-out

fields.name: return_method
fields.label: Return Method / Bank Details
fields.placeholder: e.g., Bank Transfer, Check mailed to forwarding address
